name: @compsych/ds
description: ComPsych Design System — tokens, specs, and reference implementations.

scripts.build: npm run build:tokens && npm run build:package && cd reference && npm run build:themes && npm run build
scripts.build:reference: cd reference && npm run build:themes && npm run build
scripts.sync:artifacts: npm run build:tokens && npm run build:package && cd reference && npm run build:themes

author: Konpo Studio
